title: I Could Go on Singing
writer: Robert Dozier, Mayo Simon, Dirk Bogarde
actors: Judy Garland, Dirk Bogarde, Jack Klugman
plot: Jenny Bowman is a successful singer who visits David Donne to see her son Matt again, spending a few glorious days with him while his father is away in Rome in an attempt to attain the family that she never had.
